description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the golang:1.11 Docker image with two stages: build and test. Add a before_script that creates /go/src/gitlab.com/opennota and symlinks the repository into it for all jobs. In the build stage define a build job that runs `go build ./...`. In the test stage define a test job that runs `test -z "$(gofmt -l . | tee /dev/stderr)"` to ensure no formatting issues, then `go test ./...`. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
